authors.author: Brian Doerksen
Brian Doerksen
Ich schaue auf, Herr, zu den Bergen

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You brought me this far So why would I question you now You have provided so why would I start to doubt? I've never been stranded, abandoned or left here to fight alone So I'm giving you control

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I lift my life, lift my life up I give it all in surrender I lift my heart, lift my heart up You can have it forever All my dreams, all my plans Lord I leave it in your hands I lift my life, lift my life up

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Have your way in me Have your way in me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If peace is a river then let it sweep over me If I'm under fire I know it's refining me When I hear you calling out I follow now wherever the road may go I know you're leading me home

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Take my life and let it be all for you Take my life and let it be all for you

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I lift my life, lift my life up I give it all in surrender I lift my heart, lift my heart up (take my life)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I lift my life, lift my life up I give it all in surrender (take my heart) I lift my heart, lift my heart up You can have it forever All my dreams, all my plans Lord I leave it in your hands I lift my life, lift my life up

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Have your way with me Have your way with me Have your way with me Have your way with me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Take my life and let it be all for you
